meta.summary: Senior iOS Engineer with 12+ years building production mobile applications across marketplaces, loyalty, subscriptions, and real-time products. 4+ years in Senior iOS roles at PASHA Holding (Birmarket — shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK across 3 host apps; Loyalty squad; technical lead on Premium Subscription) and GlobalLogic (watchOS voice AI R&D project). Strong in UIKit/SwiftUI, SPM, and shared SDK/platform delivery.
meta.summaryShort: Senior iOS Engineer · 4+ years in Senior roles · 12+ years on Apple platforms. At PASHA Holding — Birmarket marketplace & loyalty: contributed to shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK across 3 host apps; technical lead on Premium Subscription module extraction; high crash-free sessions during staged rollouts. UIKit/SwiftUI · SPM · SDK delivery.
meta.landingAboutLead: 4+ years in Senior roles · 12+ years on Apple platforms.
meta.landingAboutBody: At PASHA Holding — Birmarket marketplace & loyalty on the Loyalty squad. Strong in UIKit/SwiftUI, SPM, shared SDKs, Apple Pay, and WebSockets.

meta.syncRule: Edit this file first, then update all surfaces in the same session: index-short.html, cv.html, experience.html, projects.html, index.html, career/linkedin-profile.md, career/djinni-profile.md, vil4max/README.md.

highlights: Contributed to shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK across 3 production host apps
Technical lead on Premium Subscription — extraction into a dedicated SDK module; App Store release
High crash-free sessions during staged rollouts and Firebase Remote Config experiments
Unit test coverage for critical business modules (XCTest · Swift Testing)

education.displayFull: Donetsk State University of Management · Donetsk, Ukraine — Bachelor's degree, Production sector management

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.context: R&D prototype with 2 iOS engineers, Flutter, designers, BAs, and an external AI agent team.
bullets: Prototyped a voice-driven AI assistant on Apple Watch with a live backend over WebSockets and WatchConnectivity.
Built an on-device intent parser so AI commands update screens, navigation, and forms in real time.
Connected server-side intents to watchOS flows so users could complete tasks hands-free.
Shipped internal TestFlight builds; designed flows within watchOS constraints (connectivity, background execution, audio sessions).

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Birmarket — online marketplace & loyalty; Loyalty squad; shared iOS SDK in host apps (Birmarket, Birbank, M10)
roles.context: Loyalty squad (~5 developers) within ~20-person Birmarket product org (Marketplace squad ~10–15).
bullets: Contributed to shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK used in 3 production host apps, enabling parallel delivery across multiple squads.
Technical lead on Premium Subscription — requirements, implementation, localization, and App Store release (cashback/bonus logic); extracted Premium into a dedicated SDK module.
Maintained high crash-free sessions during staged rollouts and Firebase Remote Config experiments.
Delivered new product screens in SwiftUI while keeping legacy UIKit modules stable.

roles.title: iOS Engineer
roles.context: One of three iOS engineers on a cross-functional product team (~10 people).
bullets: Built ordering and drink customization flows and shipped App Store releases as one of three iOS engineers.
Split the app into SPM modules with MVP (Presenter) for new features.
Integrated Apple Pay and loyalty into checkout and implemented live order tracking over WebSockets with a polling fallback.

roles.title: iOS Developer
bullets: Built tournament flows for teams and solo players: brackets, scores, chat, leaderboards.
Live match and bracket updates over WebSockets with disconnect handling.

roles.title: iOS Developer
roles.project: Electus — crypto market info & wallet MVP
bullets: iOS Developer on crypto wallet MVP — market info and wallet flows; TestFlight builds.

roles.title: iOS Developer
bullets: Built underwriting UI with calculator-style flows for a broker tool.
Shipped client apps including shop flows and a Bluetooth/iBeacon location app.

roles.company: Early career — learning, freelance & independent delivery
roles.title: iOS Developer
roles.project: Self-study, trainee & junior roles, freelance-style and indie App Store work
bullets: Self-study from 2013, then trainee and junior roles with hands-on delivery.
Shipped indie and client App Store apps across mobility, wellness, commerce, and games.

otherProjects.name: Alchemy — Digital Assets & Precious Metals
otherProjects.blurb: R&D contract MVP (TestFlight, no App Store): KYC, wallet, buy/sell flows. Multi-env builds.
